sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, flags BITSTRING);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, flags) VALUES (1, -17.4, '10101'::BITSTRING), (2, 0.0, '11011'::BITSTRING), (3, 23.1, '10000'::BITSTRING), (4, -5.6, '11111'::BITSTRING);
SELECT id, abs(value) AS abs_value, flags & '11000'::BITSTRING AS combined_flags FROM test_table WHERE abs(value) > 10 ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, abs(value) AS abs_value, (SELECT count(*) FROM test_table t2 WHERE t2.value < test_table.value) AS lesser_count FROM test_table;
SELECT id, abs(value) AS abs_value, flags & '01111'::BITSTRING AS bitwise_flags FROM test_table GROUP BY id, abs(value), flags HAVING abs(value) < 20;
SELECT id, abs(value) AS abs_value FROM (SELECT id, SUM(value) OVER (PARTITION BY flags) AS value FROM test_table) AS subquery WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, abs(value) AS abs_value FROM test_table WHERE flags & '10000'::BITSTRING = '10000'::BITSTRING AND value > (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table);
SELECT id, abs(value) AS abs_value, (SELECT MAX(abs(value)) FROM test_table) AS max_abs_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND flags & '10101'::BITSTRING <> '0'::BITSTRING;
SELECT id, abs(value) AS abs_value FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE flags & '11111'::BITSTRING = '11111'::BITSTRING AND value < 0);
CREATE TABLE additional_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data STRING);
INSERT INTO additional_table (id, data) VALUES (1, 'Negative'), (2, 'Zero'), (3, 'Positive'), (4, NULL);
SELECT a.id, abs(b.value) AS abs_value FROM additional_table a JOIN test_table b ON a.id = b.id WHERE b.value IS NOT NULL AND a.data IS NOT NULL;
